text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hey, Fuuujiii!☆ Can we hold a big futomaki party at the dorms?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you never run out of fantastic ideas.
Sure, I will allow it.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
In fact, while we're at it, why not make it
a lavish banquet and invite everyone from
the dorms?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I'd love that!♪ I'll make sure to prepare
lots of other yummy foods too, then!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And I shall provide entertainment
with my magic.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Let's see… I could make the face on the
rolls look different with every slice…

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Or I could turn a regular-sized futomaki into a giant one with the snap of a finger… What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Whaaa?! Can you really do that?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha, I can with your help.
Let's work together to surprise everyone.
